feats.name: Flurry of Blows
feats.shortDesc: Full-attack: make one additional attack at highest BAB (+9/+9). Can spend 1 ki for a third attack.
feats.fullDesc: As a full-attack action, Agelmund can make one additional attack at his highest base attack bonus (+9). This stacks with haste. He can use unarmed strikes or monk special weapons (like the knuckle axe) in any combination. Does not take multi-weapon penalties.

feats.name: Stunning Fist (4/day, DC 14)
feats.shortDesc: Declare before attack roll. On hit: Fort DC 14 or target stunned 1 round. At level 4 can choose to fatigue instead.
feats.fullDesc: You must declare use before rolling. If the attack hits and the target fails Fort DC 14, it is stunned for 1 round (or fatigued — Agelmund's choice at 4th level). A stunned creature drops held items, cannot act, loses DEX to AC, and takes −2 penalty to AC. 4 uses per day.

feats.name: Ki Pool (6 pts)
feats.shortDesc: Supernatural energy pool. 1 pt = extra flurry attack. 2 pts = Wholeness of Body (1d8+4 healing).
feats.fullDesc: Ki pool = 1/2 monk level (2) + WIS mod (2) + Extra Ki feat (2) = 6 pts. At 3rd level, unarmed strikes count as magic weapons. Spend 1 ki as a swift action to gain one extra unarmed strike in a flurry. Spend 2 ki as a standard action for Wholeness of Body: heal 1d8+4 damage.

feats.name: Jabbing Style
feats.shortDesc: When you hit a target with an unarmed strike that you already hit this round, deal +1d6 extra damage.
feats.fullDesc: A cluster of quick strikes deals more damage than a single blow. When you hit a target with an unarmed strike AND you have hit that target with an unarmed strike previously that same round, you deal an extra 1d6 points of damage to that target. This makes Flurry of Blows very efficient.

feats.name: Improved Grapple (Granted)
feats.shortDesc: No AoO when grappling. +2 on grapple CMB checks and +2 CMD vs. grapple attempts.
feats.fullDesc: You do not provoke an attack of opportunity when performing a grapple combat maneuver. You receive a +2 bonus on checks made to grapple a foe and a +2 bonus to CMD whenever an opponent tries to grapple you. Grapple CMB: +11 (BAB 4 + STR 5 + 2 Improved Grapple).

feats.name: Deflect Arrows (Granted)
feats.shortDesc: Once per round, with a free hand, deflect one ranged weapon attack to take no damage.
feats.fullDesc: You must have at least one hand free. Once per round when you would be hit with a ranged weapon attack, you may deflect it to take no damage. You must be aware of the attack and not flat-footed. Unusually massive projectiles and natural/spell attacks cannot be deflected.

feats.name: Dodge
feats.shortDesc: +1 dodge bonus to AC (already included in AC 16).
feats.fullDesc: Your training allows you to react swiftly. You gain a +1 dodge bonus to your AC. A condition that makes you lose your DEX bonus to AC also makes you lose the benefits of this feat. This +1 is already included in the misc AC bonus.

classAbilities.name: Monk AC Bonus (Unarmored)
classAbilities.description: While unarmored and unencumbered, Agelmund adds WIS modifier (+2) to AC and CMD, plus +1 at 4th level. His misc AC bonus of +4 = WIS(+2) + monk level(+1) + Dodge feat(+1). Touch AC equals total AC (16) since he wears no armor.

classAbilities.name: Evasion
classAbilities.description: If Agelmund succeeds on a Reflex saving throw against an attack that normally deals half damage on a successful save, he instead takes no damage.

classAbilities.name: Still Mind (Lvl 4)
classAbilities.description: +2 bonus on saving throws against enchantment spells and effects.

inventory.name: Monk's Outfit
inventory.description: Simple linen clothes, perfectly suited for unarmored combat.

inventory.name: Kama
inventory.description: A sickle-like weapon favored by monks.

inventory.name: Backpack
inventory.description: Holds up to 2 cubic feet / 20 lbs.

inventory.name: Trail Rations
inventory.description: One day's worth of dried food.

inventory.name: Cloak of Resistance +1
inventory.description: A dark-hemmed cloak. +1 resistance bonus on all saving throws.

inventory.name: Bracers of Armor +2
inventory.description: Worn in place of armor. Grant +2 armor bonus to AC.
